arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola makes shock Champions League declaration: “Not the end of the world”
arts.sum: The good news for City is that the Premier League will almost certainly have a fifth team in next season’s Champions League, as English clubs have amassed the most coefficient points in European competitions this season, a stat that looks very unlikely to change. To say Manchester City haven’t had the season we were all expecting them to would be quite the understatement, with their hopes of winning the Premier League all but over, and Real Madrid knocking them out of the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Man City agree six figure sum for young goalkeeper ahead of transfer window

arts.ttl: Man City agree deal for first summer signing

Pep Guardiola reveals how long Man City Nathan Ake will be out for after defender underwent foot surgery
arts.sum: The centre-back was forced off at half-time in last weekend's FA Cup victory over Plymouth and later underwent an operation to repair a fracture in his foot.

arts.ttl: Edu talks Nottingham Forest owner into big decision – Arsenal research played a key role
arts.sum: Edu Gaspar was key to Nottingham Forest owner Evangelos Marinakis moving to invest in São Paulo, using information he’d garnered at Arsenal to his advantage. That’s according to journalist Jorge Nicola, who covers the ongoing situation with Marinakis’ ongoing effort to invest into Brazilian football.
